# frostmoln_postgres_versions (Data Source)

Lists available PostgreSQL versions for managed database instances.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `versions` (Attributes List) The list of available PostgreSQL versions. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--versions))

<a id="nestedatt--versions"></a>
### Nested Schema for `versions`

Read-Only:

- `end_of_life` (String) The end-of-life date for this version, if known.
- `status` (String) The support status of this version (e.g. "supported", "deprecated").
- `version` (String) The PostgreSQL version string (e.g. "15", "16").
